examples: She had Hanoverian stubbornness and hot temper and she was sometimes cruel and intolerant.
The Hanoverian general Freytag was taken prisoner by a French hussar, who, perceiving that he had a valuable watch, said, "Give me your watch."
At the moment when the Hanoverian lieutenant, Wilda, grasped this handle in order to take refuge in the farm, a French sapper hewed off his hand with an axe.
It was understood by all that, in the Hanoverian succession, there was an unfortunate tendency for the monarch and his heir to have differences.
The battle was fought on 21 September 1745 and saw Bonnie Prince Charlie and his Jacobite army win a resounding victory over the Hanoverian forces of King George II.
